items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Photo documentation linked to signature (before/after work)', but the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks related to this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for photo documentation, there are no concrete examples or endpoints provided that demonstrate this capability. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the current evidence.
